name: Canyon View
description: You stand at the edge of a deep canyon, looking down into a broad stone drop that satisfies several defensive and logistical criteria at once. Far below, water continues its course, refracting light into a faint band of color that has clearly outlived its original justification. Across the gap, layered cliffs rise in orderly repetition, interrupted by a dark opening where the river exits from underground. A path leads northwest. Descending into the canyon remains possible, though not encouraged.
